name: Rajnath Singh
text: Rajnath Singh: Minister of Defence. BJP. MP from Lucknow. Former Home Minister and BJP President. Heads India's defence modernization, Make in India in defence, and armed forces operations.

name: Amit Shah
text: Amit Shah: Minister of Home Affairs and Co-operation. BJP. MP from Gandhinagar. Handles internal security, border management, police reforms, J&K integration, and cooperative sector.

name: Nitin Gadkari
text: Nitin Gadkari: Minister of Road Transport and Highways. BJP. MP from Nagpur. Driving India's highway expansion — building 27 km roads/day. Key: Bharatmala, expressways, and green fuel advocacy.

name: Nirmala Sitharaman
text: Nirmala Sitharaman: Minister of Finance and Corporate Affairs. BJP. Rajya Sabha. First full-time woman FM. Presents Union Budget. Key reforms: GST rationalization, PLI schemes, startup tax benefits.

name: S. Jaishankar
text: Dr. S. Jaishankar: Minister of External Affairs. BJP. Rajya Sabha. Former Foreign Secretary. Driving India's assertive foreign policy, Quad engagement, and neighbourhood-first diplomacy.

name: Dharmendra Pradhan
text: Dharmendra Pradhan: Minister of Education and Skill Development. BJP. Implementing National Education Policy 2020. Focus: Digital university, PM SHRI Schools, and internationalization of education.

name: Piyush Goyal
text: Piyush Goyal: Minister of Commerce and Industry. BJP. Rajya Sabha. Focus: India's trade agreements, export promotion, Open Network for Digital Commerce (ONDC), and bilateral FTAs.

name: Mansukh Mandaviya
text: Mansukh Mandaviya: Minister of Labour & Employment and Youth Affairs. BJP. Former Health Minister during COVID vaccination drive. Focus: Labour code implementation and PM Mudra Yojana.

name: Bhupender Yadav
text: Bhupender Yadav: Minister of Environment, Forest and Climate Change. BJP. Rajya Sabha. India's climate commitments — net zero by 2070, renewable energy targets, and green hydrogen mission.

name: Smriti Irani
text: Smriti Irani: Former Minister of Women & Child Development. BJP. Won Amethi from Rahul Gandhi in 2019. Former HRD Minister who introduced NEP groundwork. Implemented Beti Bachao Beti Padhao.

name: Giriraj Singh
text: Giriraj Singh: Cabinet Minister. BJP. MP from Begusarai, Bihar. Focus on rural development policies and cooperative sector. Known for grassroots political engagement.

name: Hardeep Singh Puri
text: Hardeep Singh Puri: Minister of Petroleum & Natural Gas and Housing. BJP. Former Indian Foreign Service officer. Driving PMAY Housing for All, ethanol blending, and energy transition.

name: Jyotiraditya Scindia
text: Jyotiraditya Scindia: Minister of Telecommunications. BJP. Former Congress leader. Driving 5G rollout, BSNL revival, digital connectivity in rural India, and satellite-based communications.

name: Ashwini Vaishnaw
text: Ashwini Vaishnaw: Minister of Railways and Electronics & IT. BJP. IAS officer turned politician. Driving Vande Bharat trains, station redevelopment, Digital India Act, semiconductor manufacturing.

name: Sarbananda Sonowal
text: Sarbananda Sonowal: Minister of Ports, Shipping, Waterways, and AYUSH. BJP. Former Chief Minister of Assam. Focus: Sagarmala project, inland waterways, and Ayurveda promotion.
